column9: She (not to study) German this month
column10: They (to go) to the cinema this weekend
column11: It (to fly) for a long time
column12: I (to go) to give that cat some food.
column13: I (to go) to buy new shoes next week.
column14: It’s so cold! I think it (to go)  to snow.
column15: I have broken my sister’s vase. She (to go) to kill me!
column16: They (to play) the new board game now.
column17: He (to do) some very urgent work at the moment.
column18: What you (to do) here? — I (to prepare) my report at the moment.
column19: Now she (to read) the book which I gave her yesterday.
